---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem are you trying to solve?**
A clear description of the use case or pain point.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like TapBridge to do.

**Alternatives considered**
Any workarounds or other approaches you've thought about.

**Additional context**
Reader/tag types, platform, or links to relevant specs if applicable.
